caption: A static presentation slide is displayed, featuring a white background with black text and three accompanying images. The text consists of a numbered list: "1. Characterize (unconscious) bias", "2. Neural Focus Groups", and "3. Neuro-diagnostics". To the right of the first item is a small image of a man's head and shoulders. Beside the second item is an image of a black handgun with a gold-colored trigger and a wisp of smoke emanating from the barrel. To the right of the third item is a small image depicting a distorted, creature-like figure. The scene remains completely stationary across all frames, with no movement, changes in text, or shifts in the placement of the images.
